json_data.title: Efficient Transformers: Longformer, Reformer, and Linear Attention Mechanisms
json_data.reason: These models address the quadratic complexity bottleneck of self-attention in standard Transformers, offering O(n) or O(1) attention patterns while maintaining competitive performance—essential research for scaling to longer sequences.

json_data.title: Attention Mechanisms beyond Self-Attention: Sparse, Gated, and Multi-Query Attention
json_data.reason: Exploring alternative attention formulations advances understanding of how information flows in neural architectures and can lead to improved efficiency, expressiveness, or specialized capabilities for different sequence modeling tasks.

json_data.title: Vision Transformers (ViT) and Multi-Modal Transformer Architectures
json_data.reason: Extending the Transformer architecture beyond NLP to computer vision and multi-modal tasks demonstrates the framework's generalizability and represents a frontier in unified model design across domains.
